feedback.text: HOI, my name is Lloyd Kuijs and I am a gamefanate from the Netherlands. Over the years, I have seen several games disappear because of shutdowns without any possibility to continue playing. It is frustrating to see how giant companies can buy our products for which we have paid without any reason or refund, sometimes even in a short time as a few months! The Stop Killing Games initiative has already collected more than 1.4 million signatures, which clearly shows how serious this problem is and how many people are affected. Therefore, my question is that you will take this into account in your decision. Here are a number of games affected by past shutdowns: https://stopkillinggames.wiki.gg/wiki/Dead_game_list I look forward to a swift response. Kind regards, Lloyd Kuijs
